name: Chuck Adult Cat Chicken 400g
description: Composition: Meat and animal derivatives 72%, chicken 4%, cereals, minerals, vegetable protein extracts, various sugars. Analytical constituents: Moisture 82%, Protein 7.0%, Total fat 4.5%, Total ash 2.5%, Total fibrous substances 0.3%, additives /1kg. Nutritional additives: Taurine 540 mg; zinc (zinc oxide) 29.25 mg, manganese (manganese (II) oxide) 2.81 mg, iodine (coated granular calcium iodite, anhydrous) 0.67 mg, iron (iron(II) sulphate monohydrate) 22.5 mg, vitamin A (retinyl acetate) 13,500 IU, vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) 337.5 IU, vitamin E (all-rac-alpha-tocopheryl acetate) 67.5 mg, vitamin B6 (pyridoxine hydrochloride) 1.80 mg. Metabolized energy of 100 g of pet food: 332.0 kJ (80.0 kcal).
